name: ai-video-factory-pro
description: AI漫剧自动化生成系统 - 输入剧本，自动生成短视频

scripts.test:character-consistency: node scripts/run-tests.js characterBible consistencyChecker.identity continuityChecker director.artifacts pipeline.acceptance characterConsistency.acceptance promptEngineer.artifacts
scripts.test:script-parser:prod: node --test --test-name-pattern "script parser writes source script shot table and parser metrics" tests/scriptParser.artifacts.test.js
scripts.test:character-registry:prod: node --test --test-name-pattern "character registry writes registry outputs metrics and manifest when artifactContext is present" tests/promptEngineer.artifacts.test.js
scripts.test:consistency-checker:prod: node --test --test-name-pattern "consistency checker writes report flagged shots metrics and manifest when artifactContext is present" tests/ttsAgent.artifacts.test.js
scripts.test:tts-agent:prod: node --test --test-name-pattern "tts agent writes voice resolution audio index dialogue table metrics manifest and per-shot error files when artifactContext is present|director voice preset" tests/ttsAgent.artifacts.test.js tests/director.voicePreset.test.js
scripts.test:agents:prod: npm run test:script-parser:prod && npm run test:character-registry:prod && npm run test:image-generator:prod && npm run test:consistency-checker:prod && npm run test:continuity-checker:prod && npm run test:tts-agent:prod && npm run test:tts-qa:prod && npm run test:lipsync-agent:prod && npm run test:video-composer:prod && npm run test:director:prod && npm run test:pipeline:prod
